narratives.Overview: Deploy Relaxanator to Fly.io (fly.dev): containerized Next.js standalone build, fly.toml app config, and a repeatable deploy path. The app is client-heavy with no backend state, so a single small machine suffices.
narratives.Requirements: FR-1: Dockerfile producing a Next.js standalone production image. FR-2: fly.toml with app name, primary region, HTTP service on the Next.js port, and health check. FR-3: Documented deploy command path (flyctl deploy) runnable from a clean checkout. NFR-1: App serves over HTTPS on the fly.dev domain. NFR-2: Machine auto-stop/auto-start enabled so an idle app costs ~nothing. NFR-3: Deployed image passes the same task check-gated commit that produced it (no snowflake builds).

items.title: fly.toml (region, HTTP service, health check, auto-stop)
